data.body: Pushed both remaining code changes: #689 (8f1d HMAC removal) + #690 (76d2 AWS IaC), independent changes on main. 8f1d: 5886 tests pass. 76d2: terraform validate + 14 hermetic tests. Awaiting votes. Then: close 8f1d on green; for 76d2 -> terraform apply + key seed + box deploy + live checks (operator-attested) -> close. 6a89 (docs/ADR) still to do.
